description_long: This house features a single-story, modernist design with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a green base that suggests a lawn or yard. The exterior walls are predominantly white, punctuated by several light wood-toned doors and a few large, clear window panels, especially noticeable at the central section. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rooms, with some interior courtyards or open-air spaces visible from above. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical strips, providing ample natural light to the interior. Detached elements, possibly representing garages or outbuildings, are positioned around the main structure. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional, open-plan living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, and large windows, set on a green base with detached outbuildings. The design is minimalist and open, featuring both horizontal and vertical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, central courtyard, and several doors and windows, with detached structures to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated shape, minimal window openings, and detached outbuildings in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a large glass window section and more detached structures to the left, with a clear view of the open-plan layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays additional windows and the main building's depth, with detached elements at the corners.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple, flush door with no porch or steps, emphasizing minimalism and clean lines.
